headline: Bitrise Mobile Insights 2025
snippet: “Mobile development is getting more complex and demanding. These insights give engineering teams the benchmarks they need to understand where they stand and where they should focus to level up.” Árpád
full_text: “Mobile development is getting more complex and demanding. These insights give engineering teams the benchmarks they need to understand where they stand and where they should focus to level up.” Árpád Kun VP of Engineering and Infrastructure
